description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, upholstered in a dark, solid-colored fabric. The sofa features three large back cushions and three seat cushions, all of which appear to be uniform in size and shape, providing a clean and streamlined look. The armrests are straight, boxy, and padded, matching the height of the backrest and contributing to the sofa's contemporary aesthetic. The legs are short, straight, and black, positioned at the corners and slightly inset, giving the sofa a floating appearance. The upholstery is smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a minimalist design. This type of sofa is suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern living rooms, or communal lounge areas.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, dark solid upholstery, and straight padded armrests. It features uniform cushions and short, black legs for a sleek, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, three seat cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, padded armrest on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the right armrest and the extended chaise section.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, loose seat cushions and three matching back cushions arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy, padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest with a minimalist, contemporary profile.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, straight, black legs positioned at the corners and under the chaise, slightly inset for a floating effect.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three large, loose cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, dark-colored fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
